privileged_info_summary: The task creates a landscape maintenance manual for the Sullivan Residence using 12 verified installed plants (Japanese Maple, Bigleaf Hydrangea, American Boxwood, English Lavender, Giant Hosta, Kousa Dogwood, Maiden Grass, Coneflower, Arborvitae, Japanese Spurge, Catawba Rhododendron, Coral Bells). The plant database contains these 12 plants plus exactly 3 distractor plants (Hybrid Tea Rose, Tulip, White Oak). The task includes 3 verified service contacts: Irrigation (RainRight Systems, (555) 010-2233), Lighting (Lumina Outdoor, (555) 012-4455), and Arborist (Valley Tree Care, (555) 019-9988). The document must be organized by the four seasons (Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) and saved as Sullivan_Maintenance_Manual.odt.
